properties.name: Ksamil Beaches
properties.sand: White sand
properties.swimming: Warm, shallow, calm between the islets
properties.setting: Small offshore islets you can swim to, near ancient Butrint
properties.description: Turquoise coves and swim-to islets have made Ksamil the star of the fast-rising Albanian Riviera.

properties.name: Dhërmi Beach
properties.sand: White pebbles
properties.swimming: Deep and clear, calm in the mornings
properties.setting: A long pebble beach below the Ceraunian Mountains and a hillside old village
properties.description: The Albanian Riviera's headline beach — clear turquoise below the Ceraunian Mountains, with beach clubs and a hilltop old village.

properties.name: Drymades Beach
properties.sand: A long white-pebble and sand beach with beach bars among olive and pine
properties.swimming: Clear and deep-shelving, calm in the mornings
properties.setting: Just north of Dhërmi below the Ceraunian Mountains, a hub of beach clubs and summer nightlife
properties.description: Dhërmi's lively neighbour — a long turquoise strand of beach clubs and pines beneath the Ceraunian Mountains.

properties.name: Durrës Beach
properties.sand: Kilometres of wide golden-brown sand lined with hotels
properties.swimming: Warm, shallow and calm — Albania's classic family sea
properties.setting: The long resort strip stretching south from the ancient port city of Durrës, Albania's busiest beach
properties.description: Albania's busiest beach — a long, warm, shallow Adriatic strand of resorts stretching south from the ancient port of Durrës.

properties.name: Gjipe Beach
properties.sand: White pebbles and coarse sand
properties.swimming: Deep and clear
properties.setting: At the mouth of a dramatic canyon, reached on foot or by boat
properties.description: Hidden where a deep canyon meets the Ionian, Gjipe is the wild heart of the Albanian Riviera.

properties.name: Porto Palermo
properties.sand: Small pebble beaches flanking the castle's causeway
properties.water: Deep, calm, clear blue in a sheltered double bay
properties.swimming: Calm and clear in the sheltered bay around the castle peninsula
properties.setting: A dramatic bay south of Himarë where Ali Pasha's stone castle sits on its own peninsula
properties.description: A sheltered Ionian bay where Ali Pasha's castle guards its own rocky peninsula, with calm clear coves on either side.

properties.name: Borsh Beach
properties.sand: Fine pebbles and sand
properties.swimming: Clear and calm along a long open strand
properties.setting: The Riviera's longest beach, backed by olive groves beneath a hilltop castle
properties.description: The Albanian Riviera's longest beach — seven quiet kilometres of pebble and clear water beneath olive groves and a castle.

properties.name: Jale Beach
properties.sand: White pebbles
properties.swimming: Clear, calm and deep-shelving
properties.setting: A compact bay between Dhërmi and Himarë with beach bars and camping
properties.description: A compact turquoise cove between Dhërmi and Himarë, a favourite of the young Albanian-Riviera crowd.

properties.name: Kakome Bay
properties.sand: White pebbles on an undeveloped turquoise bay
properties.swimming: Deep, clear and calm
properties.setting: A wild, hard-to-reach bay between Sarandë and Himarë, long eyed for development
properties.description: A brilliant turquoise bay of white pebbles on the Riviera between Sarandë and Himarë, still wild and undeveloped.

properties.name: Livadhi Beach
properties.sand: A long arc of white pebbles and sand
properties.swimming: Clear, calm and gently shelving
properties.setting: Olive terraces spilling to a broad bay just north of Himarë town
properties.description: Himarë's big easy bay — a kilometre of white pebbles and clear turquoise under the olive terraces.

properties.name: Palasë Beach
properties.sand: Long white pebble-sand below the Llogara pass
properties.swimming: Clear and deep-shelving; morning calm
properties.setting: The first great beach below the Llogara mountain pass, where paragliders land
properties.description: Where the Riviera begins — paragliders spiral down from the Llogara pass onto Palasë's white shore.

properties.name: Qeparo Beach
properties.sand: A long curve of pebble and coarse sand below the old stone village
properties.swimming: Clear, calm and gently shelving
properties.setting: Below the hillside old village of Qeparo, between olive groves and the sea south of Himarë
properties.description: A long, quiet Riviera beach below Qeparo's hillside stone village, backed by olive groves and clear turquoise water.

properties.name: Shëngjin Beach
properties.sand: A long sandy beach lined with hotels and beach bars
properties.swimming: Warm, shallow and family-friendly
properties.setting: A busy northern resort town beside the Kune-Vain lagoons, backed by a wooded hill
properties.description: Northern Albania's big sandy resort beach — a long warm-water strand of hotels and bars beside the Kune-Vain lagoons.

properties.name: Velipojë Beach
properties.sand: A very long, wide beach of fine dark sand, reputed to be mildly therapeutic
properties.swimming: Warm, shallow and safe — a family favourite
properties.setting: A sprawling family resort near the Buna river mouth and a protected lagoon reserve, south of Shkodër
properties.description: A vast, shallow family beach of fine sand near the Buna river delta — one of northern Albania's most popular summer resorts.

properties.name: Neum Beach
properties.sand: Pebble and concrete-terrace bathing spots
properties.water: Calm, clear Adriatic blue in a deep sheltered bay
properties.swimming: Warm and calm — the bay is protected by the Pelješac peninsula
properties.setting: Bosnia's only seaside town, on a fjord-like channel behind Pelješac
properties.description: Bosnia and Herzegovina's entire coastline in one town — a sheltered, warm Adriatic channel behind the Pelješac peninsula.

properties.name: Knokke-Heist
properties.sand: A very wide, flat golden beach at Belgium's smartest resort
properties.swimming: Shallow and calm, lifeguarded in summer
properties.surf: None, though a sand-yacht and kite beach
properties.setting: Upmarket villas, art galleries and the Zwin nature reserve
properties.description: Belgium's most elegant seaside resort spreads an enormously wide beach beneath chic villas and galleries.

properties.name: De Haan Beach
properties.sand: Wide, flat golden sand
properties.swimming: Shallow and lifeguarded in season
properties.setting: Belgium's best-preserved belle-époque resort, all villas and tram bells
properties.description: Belle-époque Belgium intact — a broad family beach below the whitewashed villas where Einstein once summered.

properties.name: De Panne Beach
properties.sand: Very wide, flat pale sand
properties.swimming: Very shallow with a huge tidal range
properties.setting: Belgium's widest beach, birthplace of sand-yachting, beside high dunes
properties.description: Belgium's widest beach — a vast flat expanse of firm sand beneath big dunes, the birthplace of sand-yachting.

properties.name: Ostend Beach
properties.sand: Wide golden sand
properties.swimming: Shallow and gentle, lifeguarded in summer
properties.setting: The lively city beach of Belgium's 'Queen of Coastal Resorts'
properties.description: The broad city beach of Ostend, the 'Queen of the Belgian Coast', backed by a grand promenade and casino.

properties.name: Golden Sands
properties.sand: Famously fine, deep golden sand
properties.swimming: Warm, gently shelving and family-friendly
properties.setting: A forested nature-park hillside dropping to Bulgaria's classiest resort beach
properties.description: The sand really is golden — a deep, fine strand beneath the forested hills of a Black Sea nature park.

properties.name: Sunny Beach
properties.sand: Eight kilometres of fine golden sand
properties.water: Warm, gently shelving Black Sea blue
properties.swimming: Warm, shallow and lifeguarded along the resort strip
properties.setting: Bulgaria's biggest resort, next to the UNESCO old town of Nesebar
properties.description: Bulgaria's party flagship — eight kilometres of warm golden sand beside the ancient peninsula town of Nesebar.

properties.name: Harmanite Beach
properties.sand: Soft brown-gold sand
properties.swimming: Gentle and shallow in the town bay
properties.setting: The southern beach of Bulgaria's prettiest old town, all wooden houses and cobbles
properties.description: The house beach of Sozopol's cobbled old town — Bulgaria's answer to a Greek island port.

properties.name: Shkorpilovtsi Beach
properties.sand: Soft pale sand and low dunes running some 13 km — Bulgaria's longest beach
properties.swimming: Long shallow entry; modest waves build on onshore days
properties.setting: Backed by dunes, woods and campsites south of the Kamchia river mouth, with a lone research pier marking the middle of the strand
properties.description: Thirteen unbroken kilometres of dune-backed sand — Bulgaria's longest beach and one of its emptiest.

properties.name: Silistar Beach
properties.sand: Fine light-golden sand in a bay pinched between two low green capes
properties.swimming: Sheltered and gently shelving; usually calm when the north wind stays away
properties.setting: Deep in the Silistar protected area on the Strandzha coast, minutes from the Turkish border; the little Silistar river seeps out at one end
properties.description: Bulgaria's last bay before Turkey — clear water and empty sand at the wild edge of Strandzha.

properties.name: Veleka Beach
properties.sand: A wild sandbar of pale sand
properties.water: Clear Black Sea blue meeting a green river
properties.swimming: Swim the sea side; the river mouth has currents
properties.setting: Where the Veleka river loops into the sea below the wild Strandzha hills
properties.description: A sandbar pinched between a looping green river and the open Black Sea, at the wild southern end of Bulgaria's coast.

properties.name: Albena Beach
properties.sand: Wide, fine golden sand
properties.swimming: Among the safest family swimming on the Black Sea — shallow for 150m out
properties.setting: A purpose-built resort backed by the Baltata riverine forest reserve
properties.description: A resort strand so shallow you can wade a hundred metres out — Bulgaria's classic family beach beside a jungle-like forest reserve.

properties.name: Bolata Beach
properties.sand: A small crescent of pale sand
properties.swimming: Sheltered and shallow inside the red-cliff cove
properties.setting: A hidden valley cove between rust-red cliffs in the Kaliakra reserve
properties.description: A secret crescent tucked between rust-red cliffs where the Kaliakra steppe suddenly opens to the sea.

properties.name: Irakli Beach
properties.sand: Long, soft pale sand and low dunes
properties.swimming: Open and gently shelving; some naturist stretches
properties.setting: A protected, mostly undeveloped strand below the Balkan mountains' last slopes
properties.description: Bulgaria's bohemian escape — a long, protected strand where the Balkan range slides into the Black Sea.

properties.name: Nissi Beach
properties.sand: Soft white sand with a shallow sandbar out to a tiny islet
properties.swimming: Warm shallow water; wade across the sandbar to the islet
properties.setting: A lively resort beach with bars, foam parties and watersports
properties.description: Cyprus's famous party beach, where a shallow sandbar leads to a little islet off Ayia Napa.

properties.name: Petra tou Romiou
properties.sand: Banded grey and white pebbles polished smooth by the surf
properties.water: Intense sapphire, foaming white around the great sea stack
properties.swimming: A quick dip close to shore — currents and sudden depth around the rocks demand caution
properties.setting: Aphrodite's mythical birthplace on the old Paphos-Limassol coast road, a giant limestone sea stack rising from the surf-line
properties.description: Aphrodite's birthplace — sapphire surf breaking on pebbles around a colossal limestone sea stack.

properties.name: Fig Tree Bay
properties.sand: Fine golden sand sloping into shallow water
properties.swimming: Calm shallow water, excellent for families; an islet to swim to
properties.setting: An organised resort bay named after a lone centuries-old fig tree
properties.description: A calm golden-sand resort bay off Protaras, regularly rated among Europe's best beaches.

properties.name: Konnos Bay
properties.sand: Fine golden sand
properties.swimming: Warm, sheltered and shallow in the bay
properties.setting: A sheltered cove between pine-clad headlands in the Cape Greco park
properties.description: A sheltered turquoise cove cradled by pine-clad headlands at the edge of Cyprus's wild Cape Greco park.

properties.name: Kourion Beach
properties.sand: Grey-brown sand and fine shingle along an open, breezy strand
properties.water: Clean open-sea blue, livelier than Cyprus's sheltered east-coast bays
properties.swimming: Fine on calm mornings; wind and waves build most afternoons
properties.surf: Breezy afternoons draw kitesurfers and windsurfers to the open bay
properties.setting: Directly below the Greco-Roman theatre and mosaics of ancient Kourion, with a short strip of fish tavernas on the sand
properties.description: Swim beneath a Greco-Roman theatre — ancient Kourion's breezy, taverna-dotted strand.

properties.name: Coral Bay
properties.sand: Soft golden sand
properties.swimming: Warm, calm and shallow between two headlands
properties.setting: A sheltered resort bay of golden sand north of Paphos
properties.description: A sheltered golden-sand resort bay north of Paphos, calm and shallow between two low limestone headlands.

properties.name: Governor's Beach
properties.sand: Dark grey sand beneath chalk-white cliffs
properties.swimming: Warm and gently shelving below the white ledges
properties.setting: White chalk bluffs and fish tavernas between Limassol and Larnaca
properties.description: Cyprus in negative — charcoal sand beneath chalk-white cliffs, with fish tavernas on the ledge above.

properties.name: Lara Beach
properties.sand: Pale sand
properties.swimming: Clear and open; a protected nesting beach — respect the turtles
properties.setting: A wild, roadless turtle-nesting beach in the Akamas peninsula reserve
properties.description: A wild, roadless beach in the Akamas reserve where loggerhead and green turtles come ashore to nest each summer.

properties.name: Makronissos Beach
properties.sand: Soft pale-gold sand over three linked coves
properties.swimming: Calm and family-gentle in the coves
properties.setting: Three coves and ancient rock-cut tombs west of Ayia Napa
properties.description: Three gentle turquoise coves sharing a headland with ancient rock-cut tombs, on Ayia Napa's calmer side.

properties.name: Kampen Beach
properties.sand: Wide pale sand beneath the glowing Rotes Kliff, the Red Cliff
properties.swimming: Bracing North Sea swimming with strong surf and tides
properties.surf: Occasional North Sea swell; Sylt is a German surf hub
properties.setting: The red-ochre cliff and heath of Germany's most fashionable northern island
properties.description: Germany's most fashionable island beach runs beneath the glowing ochre face of Sylt's Red Cliff.

properties.name: Westerland Beach
properties.sand: Broad white-gold sand lined with hundreds of hooded wicker Strandkörbe
properties.water: Green open North Sea with proper waves
properties.swimming: Real swell and tidal pull; swim between the flags at the guarded zones
properties.surf: Consistent beach breaks; the Windsurf World Cup runs off Brandenburger Strand each autumn
properties.setting: Six kilometres of promenade-backed sand fronting Sylt's busy main town, dunes stretching away north and south
properties.description: Germany's most famous island resort meets the open North Sea — wicker beach chairs, white sand and real surf.

properties.name: Binz Beach
properties.sand: Long white sand lined with hooded wicker beach chairs
properties.swimming: Gentle, shallow Baltic swimming
properties.setting: White seaside-resort villas and a pier on Germany's largest island
properties.description: Rugen's grand white-villa resort lines a broad Baltic strand dotted with hooded wicker beach chairs.

properties.name: Heringsdorf Beach
properties.sand: Fine pale powder sand, raked flat between rows of Strandkörbe
properties.swimming: Gentle shelf and small waves — easy bathing water since imperial times
properties.setting: Germany's longest pier (508 m) juts from a seafront of white belle-époque villas; the promenade runs unbroken to Świnoujście in Poland
properties.description: The grandest of Usedom's Kaiserbäder — powder sand, wedding-cake villas and Germany's longest pier.

properties.name: Kniepsand
properties.sand: A bare sandbank up to 1.5 km wide — the walk to the waterline can take twenty minutes
properties.water: Churning green North Sea beyond ribbed tidal runnels
properties.swimming: Swim only at the guarded bathing points — currents and shifting bars are serious on the open sand
properties.setting: A ten-kilometre sandbank welded to Amrum's west coast, reached on boardwalks over the dunes from Norddorf, Nebel and Wittdün
properties.description: Amrum's Kniepsand is less a beach than a small white desert — a kilometre of bare sand between dune and surf.

properties.name: St. Peter-Ording
properties.sand: Vast flat pale sand
properties.water: Shallow North Sea over huge tidal flats
properties.swimming: Very shallow with big tides; a vast flats-and-wind beach
properties.setting: Germany's largest beach, famous for stilt houses out on the tidal sand
properties.description: Germany's vast North Sea beach — kilometres of tidal sand dotted with iconic stilt-legged houses and kitesurfers.

properties.name: Timmendorfer Strand
properties.sand: Fine pale sand lined with hooded wicker beach chairs
properties.swimming: Gentle and family-friendly along the bay
properties.setting: Germany's smartest Baltic resort on Lübeck Bay, promenade and piers included
properties.description: Germany's polished Baltic classic — ranks of hooded wicker chairs on pale sand along Lübeck Bay.

properties.name: Norderney Weststrand
properties.sand: Wide white North Sea sand
properties.swimming: Bracing, with guarded bathing zones; big skies and big air
properties.surf: Germany's oldest surf spot, a small faithful scene
properties.setting: A spa island of dunes and thalasso tradition in the Wadden Sea UNESCO zone
properties.description: Germany's original seaside cure — white Frisian sand and North Sea air on the spa island of Norderney.

properties.name: Prerow Beach
properties.sand: Wide pale sand
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and clean
properties.setting: A broad, forest-backed beach in the wild Darß-Zingst national park
properties.description: A broad, gently shelving Baltic beach backed by the wind-sculpted pine forest of the wild Darß national park.

properties.name: Warnemünde
properties.sand: Wide pale sand
properties.swimming: Shallow and calm, lined with hooded wicker chairs
properties.setting: A grand Baltic seaside resort at the mouth of the Warnow with a lighthouse
properties.description: A broad Baltic resort beach dotted with hooded wicker chairs beneath a white lighthouse at the mouth of the Warnow.

properties.name: Amager Strandpark
properties.sand: Two kilometres of imported white sand on a purpose-built island
properties.water: Clean Øresund blue outside; a warm, waist-deep lagoon behind
properties.swimming: Lagoon side child-shallow; the sea side drops off bathing jetties
properties.setting: Fifteen minutes by metro from central Copenhagen, facing the Øresund Bridge and a line of offshore turbines
properties.description: Copenhagen's engineered island beach — ride the metro out, swim the Øresund, watch the bridge.

properties.name: Bellevue Beach
properties.sand: A tidy crescent of imported golden sand
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and family-friendly, a short train ride from the city
properties.setting: Copenhagen's designer beach at Klampenborg, with Arne Jacobsen's striped lifeguard towers and kiosks
properties.description: Copenhagen's design-classic beach — Arne Jacobsen's striped lifeguard towers over a calm Øresund crescent, minutes from the city.

properties.name: Blåvand Beach
properties.sand: Enormously wide white-gold sand under low dunes
properties.water: North Sea green, unusually clear and calm for the west coast
properties.swimming: Gentler than the rest of the west coast — Horns Rev offshore blunts the waves
properties.setting: Denmark's westernmost point: summer-house dunes, a lighthouse and WW2 bunkers wearing sculpted mule heads
properties.description: Denmark's westernmost beach — vast white sand, reef-sheltered bathing and bunkers turned into mule sculptures.

properties.name: Dueodde
properties.sand: Famously fine, powder-white quartz sand
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and family-friendly Baltic swimming
properties.setting: Pine forest, dunes and a tall lighthouse at Bornholm's southern tip
properties.description: Powder-fine white sand so pure it was once used in hourglasses, on Bornholm's sun-soaked southern tip.

properties.name: Grenen
properties.sand: Pale gold
properties.swimming: Cold, strong currents
properties.setting: Denmark’s northern sandspit
properties.description: Stand with a foot in two seas where the Skagerrak and Kattegat collide.

properties.name: Klitmøller
properties.sand: Pale sand and shingle scattered with colourful fishing boats
properties.swimming: Cold and lively; this is surf country, not calm bathing
properties.surf: 'Cold Hawaii' — Denmark's premier surf and windsurf coast, host to a world-cup wave
properties.setting: A former fishing hamlet in Thy National Park that became Northern Europe's surf capital
properties.description: 'Cold Hawaii' — a windswept Thy fishing village turned Northern Europe's surf capital, with world-class North Sea waves.

properties.name: Blokhus Beach
properties.sand: Kilometres of wide, firm golden sand you can drive a car onto
properties.water: Cool, shallow North Sea with a gentle shelf
properties.swimming: Shallow and lifeguarded in summer, though bracing
properties.setting: A cheerful North Jutland resort with white bathing huts, a red beach beacon and a drive-on beach
properties.description: A wide North Jutland resort beach of firm golden sand — famous for its white bathing huts, red beacon and cars parked on the strand.

properties.name: Fanø Beach
properties.sand: One of Northern Europe's widest beaches — a vast firm sand flat
properties.water: Shallow, cool Wadden Sea that retreats far at low tide
properties.swimming: Shallow and gentle, but the tide goes a very long way out
properties.surf: Wind sports on the wide flats
properties.setting: The immense west-facing beach of the Wadden Sea island of Fanø, off Esbjerg
properties.description: One of Northern Europe's widest beaches — a vast firm sand flat on the Wadden Sea island of Fanø, big enough for cars, kites and sail-karts.

properties.name: Henne Strand
properties.sand: Wide pale sand and dunes
properties.swimming: Bracing and open; watch for currents
properties.setting: A wild dune-backed North Sea beach on Jutland's west coast
properties.description: A wild, dune-backed North Sea beach on Jutland's windswept west coast, all big skies and rolling grey-blue surf.

properties.name: Hornbæk Beach
properties.sand: A generous belt of soft white sand behind grassy dunes
properties.swimming: Clear, gently shelving and family-friendly, among Zealand's best
properties.setting: The classic summer resort of North Zealand's 'Danish Riviera', with a harbour and pine-dune backdrop
properties.description: The star of North Zealand's 'Danish Riviera' — a broad white-sand beach with clear Kattegat water and a pretty harbour, long loved by Copenhageners.

properties.name: Lakolk Beach
properties.sand: An immense flat of firm pale sand — among Europe's widest
properties.water: Shallow North Sea over endless tidal flats
properties.swimming: Very shallow with big tides; more wading than swimming
properties.setting: A Wadden Sea island beach so wide cars park on the sand itself
properties.description: A beach so wide it has car lanes — Rømø's immense Wadden Sea sand flat, one of the broadest in Europe.

properties.name: Løkken Beach
properties.sand: Wide pale sand
properties.swimming: Shallow and gentle; bracing North Sea temperatures
properties.setting: A broad Jutland beach lined with white bathing huts, drivable by car
properties.description: A broad North Sea strand lined with rows of white wooden bathing huts, wide enough to drive your car onto the sand.

properties.name: Marielyst
properties.sand: Fine pale sand
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and family-friendly
properties.setting: Denmark's favourite family summer-house beach on the island of Falster
properties.description: Denmark's classic summer-house beach — a long, gently shelving strand of pale sand on the Baltic island of Falster.

properties.name: Tisvildeleje Beach
properties.sand: Pale sand and smooth stones below heather hills
properties.swimming: Gently shelving and clean — Copenhagen's summer swim
properties.setting: The 'Danish Riviera' village where Copenhagen summers, beside the ancient Tisvilde grove
properties.description: Copenhagen's beloved summer village — clean Kattegat water off pale sand beneath the old Tisvilde grove.

properties.name: Vejers Strand
properties.sand: A wide, open expanse of pale North Sea sand behind high dunes
properties.swimming: Bracing with steady surf; lifeguarded zones in summer
properties.surf: Open Atlantic swell and steady wind — a west-coast surf and windsurf beach
properties.setting: A broad, dune-backed beach on the wild west coast of Jutland, north of Blåvand
properties.description: A broad, dune-backed North Sea beach on Jutland's wild west coast, with open swell and wind for surfers north of Blåvand.

properties.name: Vorupør
properties.sand: Broad pale sand with fishing boats drawn up on the shore
properties.swimming: Cold with strong surf; a netted, lifeguarded bathing zone in summer
properties.surf: A classic Cold Hawaii surf beach beside Klitmøller, in Thy National Park
properties.setting: A traditional fishing village on the wild North Sea coast of Thy
properties.description: A traditional Thy fishing village on the wild North Sea coast, part of the Cold Hawaii surf belt beside Klitmøller.

properties.name: Parnu Beach
properties.sand: Wide, shallow-shelving white sand
properties.water: Shallow, warm and calm Gulf of Riga water
properties.swimming: Excellent, shallow and gentle and among the Baltic's warmest
properties.setting: Estonia's summer capital, with a promenade, spa hotels and parks
properties.description: Estonia's summer capital fronts a broad, shallow strand where the Baltic warms to genuinely swimmable.

properties.name: Järve Beach
properties.sand: Fine white sand and low grassy dunes
properties.water: Shallow, clear and clean Baltic water
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and family-friendly
properties.setting: Saaremaa island's best sand, backed by juniper heath and pine
properties.description: The island of Saaremaa's finest sand — a quiet white ribbon of dunes and junipers on Estonia's slow-living isle.

properties.name: Narva-Jõesuu Beach
properties.sand: Seven kilometres of fine white sand
properties.water: Shallow, calm and briefly summer-warm Gulf of Finland water
properties.swimming: Very shallow and gentle — the Baltic at its mildest
properties.setting: A tsarist-era spa resort of wooden villas under tall pines, at the Narva river mouth
properties.description: A tsarist spa resort's seven-kilometre white strand under the pines, at Estonia's eastern edge.

properties.name: Pirita Beach
properties.sand: Fine pale sand
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm and briefly summer-warm
properties.setting: Tallinn's long city beach with medieval-skyline and convent-ruin views
properties.description: Tallinn's long, pine-backed city beach, its pale sand looking back to the medieval spires across the bay.

properties.name: Võsu Beach
properties.sand: Soft light sand edged by pines, with the odd granite boulder offshore
properties.water: Shallow, brackish and quick to warm in a sunny week
properties.swimming: Waist-deep a long way out — child-friendly and noticeably warmer than the open gulf
properties.setting: A wooden-villa resort village inside Lahemaa National Park on pine-rimmed Käsmu Bay, quiet outside July
properties.description: Lahemaa's summer village — a shallow, pine-rimmed bay that has drawn Estonian holidaymakers since tsarist times.

properties.name: Playa de Maspalomas
properties.sand: Vast rolling golden dunes meeting the sea
properties.swimming: Generally calm and gently shelving
properties.setting: A protected 400-hectare reserve of desert dunes
properties.description: A Sahara in miniature where hundreds of hectares of golden dunes tumble straight into the Atlantic.

properties.name: Cala Formentor
properties.sand: Fine white sand
properties.swimming: Calm and shallow, family-friendly
properties.setting: Pine forest below the dramatic Formentor peninsula
properties.description: A kilometre of pine-fringed white sand and shallow turquoise water at the tip of Mallorca's wildest cape.

properties.name: Cala Macarella
properties.sand: Fine white sand
properties.swimming: Calm, shallow and sheltered
properties.setting: Limestone cliffs draped in Aleppo pines
properties.description: A postcard Menorcan cove of blinding white sand and turquoise water framed by pine-topped cliffs.

properties.name: Cala Macarelleta
properties.sand: Fine white
properties.swimming: Shallow, calm, warm
properties.setting: Pine-cloaked cove, hike-in
properties.description: A pine-framed turquoise cove, Menorca’s most beautiful and boat-only.

properties.name: Grandes Playas de Corralejo
properties.sand: Kilometres of fine white sand spilling from a desert of dunes
properties.swimming: Warm and clear, but open Atlantic — expect some wind, waves and current
properties.surf: Breezy days bring surf and windsurf to the open stretches
properties.setting: The vast dune-backed beaches of the Corralejo Natural Park, facing the islet of Lobos in Fuerteventura's north
properties.description: Kilometres of white sand spilling from a desert of dunes into a turquoise Atlantic, in Fuerteventura's north.

properties.name: Mundaka
properties.sand: A shifting sandbar at the estuary mouth
properties.swimming: For surfers only; strong river currents
properties.setting: The Urdaibai estuary, a UNESCO biosphere reserve
properties.description: One of Europe's finest waves, a legendary long left barrel peeling off the Urdaibai sandbar.

properties.name: Playa de la Concha
properties.sand: Golden
properties.swimming: Calm, cool, safe
properties.setting: Elegant Belle-Époque bay
properties.description: A perfect shell-shaped city bay ringed by an ornate promenade.

properties.name: Playa de las Catedrales
properties.sand: Golden sand revealed only at low tide
